Name: CEA Industries Inc.
Description: BNC, operating as CEA Industries Inc., is a prominent leader in the controlled environment agriculture (CEA) sector, dedicated to advancing innovative technologies and infrastructure that enhance plant growth and agricultural productivity. The company provides a comprehensive suite of services, including greenhouse manufacturing, systems integration, and tailored consulting, catering predominantly to commercial growers and large agricultural enterprises. With a steadfast commitment to sustainability and operational excellence, BNC is strategically positioned to address the increasing global demand for food security and resilient farming solutions, solidifying its role as a key player in the dynamic agri-tech industry.
Address: 385 SOUTH PIERCE AVENUE, LOUISVILLE, CO, UNITED STATES, 80027
